articles.title: Voda Idea shares surge 4%, extend rise to 3rd day: AGR relief to KM Birla's return — Key factors behind rally explained
articles.summary: Vodafone Idea stock price gained 4.07% to hit the day's high of ₹11.24 today — its highest level since 19 February. Meanwhile, in three sessions, the telco has risen almost 10%.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: United Breweries shares fall nearly 5% after Q4 results. Is it time to buy or sell?
articles.summary: United Breweries shares fell nearly 5% on May 6 after Q4 results showed a 4.2% rise in net profit to ₹101.87 crore, despite a slight decline in revenue from operations. Overall FY26 net profit declined 6.55% amid mixed performance.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Bajaj Auto Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Two-wheeler stock jumps 2% ahead of results — Dividend, buyback announcements eyed
articles.summary: Bajaj Auto Q4 Results LIVE: Two-wheeler major Bajaj Auto is slated to announce its Q4 results 2026 today. Ahead of earnings, the auto stock traded higher, with investors keenly eyeing the announcement around buyback and dividend.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Crude oil prices fall for second day amid US-Iran peace talks hopes; Brent below below $110/bbl mark

articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: M&M shares rise nearly 3% after Q4 results, emerge as top Nifty 50 gainer. Should you buy, sell or hold?

articles.label: BULLISH

articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Rupee opens 24 paise higher at 95.04 against US dollar

articles.label: BEARISH
